title: oglifa gallica
intro: Oglifa gallica, also known as Chrysanthemum leucanthemum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and it is known for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Chrysanthemum leucanthemum has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, providing relief from symptoms such as coughing, sore throats, and headaches. The plant can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional herbal remedies.
